name: Chocolate Orange Supreme Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, cinnamon, and melted margarine. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan. Bake at 325 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in sour cream and vanilla.
3. Blend in melted semi-sweet chocolate chips. Mix in orange-flavored liqueur and grated orange peel.
4. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan over the crust. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 30 minutes.
5. Reduce oven temperature to 325 degrees F. Spoon the remaining batter over the chocolate layer and continue baking for another 30 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven, loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, and cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill thoroughly.
